title: Arc<dyn TransportConfig> blanket impl absent; asymmetry undocumented
description: AuthProvider has blanket impls for both Box<dyn AuthProvider> and Arc<dyn AuthProvider>. TransportConfig has only Box<dyn TransportConfig>. The asymmetry is load-bearing (transport is consumed at construction; auth is stored as Arc) but this rationale appears nowhere in the blanket impl comments. A contributor who adds a method to TransportConfig will mirror it in the Box blanket but not realize there is no Arc blanket to update.
